Ryan’s “Big Idea” Template 

Version: Jan. 3, 2017

"Do NOT ever under-estimate the task at hand when it comes to moving prospects to buy. It takes extreme, extraordinary measures to compel people to act!"

The product and editor is _______________________________________________________________                            (Also note if this is front-end or back end offer….)

What are the best qualities of this editor? __________________________________________________                                                            (What makes him/her an AUTHORITY figure? Social proof? Rags-to-riches/transformation story, etc.? Past predictions?)

The actual moneymaking opportunity is____________________________________________________                            (List actual recommendation/s …specific stock(s), trend, investment, strategy, market, etc. BE AS SPECIFIC AS POSSIBLE)

What is your most powerful proof this opportunity is real?___________________________________________                                            (Can you demonstrate it with real examples? Historical/back-tested results? Testimonials? Tell a true transformation story of someone finding/using this mechanism/opportunity to achieve wealth/success/health?)

This opportunity satisfies the primal desire of this market to ____________________________________                                (what is your PRIMARY PROMISE to solve an urgent PROBLEM… be ultras-specific… make a promise with BALLS) 

The “magic mechanism(s)” that lets readers achieve this desire is  ____________________________________                  (what is the new THING that lets the reader get desired outcome? Transubstantiation/naming/system?)

This is unique because_________________________________________________________________                                                     (how will you position this THING to avoid Categorical Imperative/opt-out? What is it not? Why better?)

Readers need to get in right now because___________________________________________________                                (be ultras-specific, including actual dates if possible… can you name or frame the investment catalyst?) 

This is the biggest, most important thing in all of history / our lifetimes because _____________________

How does the solution make this “done for you” without having to _______________________________

What kind of lead are you thinking of using? _________________________________________________                       (Predictions, systems package, hot stock alert, story, invitation, secret, etc.?)

If there is a villain in the promotion, who is he/she?________________________________________________

What are the intangible or material benefits from use of Magic Mechanism? ______________________                               (mental pictures – boats, cars, real estate, etc. Or sleeping better at night, etc.)

This opportunity is like _______________________________________________________________________________ (list as many powerful, visual metaphors and analogies as you can think of….)

Can you brainstorm a “hook” for your lead?_____________________________________________________________             (An apparent incongruence or dramatic irony… something outrageous that should not exist… or a pattern Interrupt?)

What is your superior, irresistible offer?___________________________________________________________                             (Rough ideas for funnel/upsells/bonuses, etc.? Scarcity? Guarantee/no refunds? Reason why for offer?)

Can you add a “twist” or “wow” moment later in the package?___________________________________                                                                            (Something you can hold back from the lead, e.g. a deeper benefit, a reveal, or a goodie/extra, etc.)                      



STEP 2: Sharpen Your “Big Idea” Razor Sharp….

Write down a 250-word “proof of concept” to summarize your Big Idea….

Go verbally pitch this concept to at least 5 people, note their feedback….

Run your idea through the filters/checklists below:

E.C. (P.P. + U.M.) + I.I. = B.I.

E.C. = Emotionally Compelling?

P.P. = Primary Promise .... what is the outcome and transformation from product?

U.M. = Unique Mechanism... provides the hope they will get this transformation from product?

I.I.  = Intellectually Interesting... feeling of discovery... "Ah-Ha!" moment... newsworthy, something they'll share with other people?

S.E.E.M.S. -- Strange? Exciting? Emotional? Massive? Simplified?

Bencivenga Equation: Urgent problem + unique promise + unquestionable proof + user-friendly proposition = persuasion

1. Does this address an urgent problem or desire?

2. Does it make a promise of a uniquely superior solution?

3. Does it prove to me beyond a shadow of doubt why the solution is uniquely superior?

4. Does it make it irresistible for me to try it?

Ogilvy Meter:

1. Did it make me gasp when I first saw it?

2. Do I wish I had thought of it myself?

3. Is it unique?

4. Does it fit the marketing strategy to perfection?

5. Could it be used for 30 years?



STEP 3: Copy-boarding to Create 1-Page Outline

1. Form your pitch  ... Big Idea --> Barstool or Elevator Pitch  "Holy shit, what until you hear this… " (deliver this verbally)

2. Anticipating objections ...List all the possible objections (using post-it notes or notecards)

3. Organizing the objections in the order the reader will have them

4. Create "mini-sells" to overcome each objection ....these are your subheads... (whole thing should fit on 1 piece of paper)

5. Fill in subheads to construct 30-page promotion …use "1-2-3 C-P-B Chunks" to fill in each subhead… (C: Claim P: Proof B: Benefits)
